description: Create a custom Wazuh detection rule (ID 100250, Level 10) within the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container that triggers when the 'tar' command is executed to compress the directory '/opt/sensitive_project'. The rule must be added to '/var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml'. Use the auditd log samples in '/home/ga/data/audit_staging_sample.log' to ensure the rule correctly identifies the specific activity while avoiding triggers on benign tar usage.

metadata.malicious_log: type=EXECVE msg=audit(1698234001.123:101): argc=4 a0="tar" a1="-czf" a2="/tmp/backup_sensitive.tar.gz" a3="/opt/sensitive_project"
metadata.benign_log: type=EXECVE msg=audit(1698234055.456:102): argc=4 a0="tar" a1="-czf" a2="/tmp/my_docs.tar.gz" a3="/home/user/documents"
